content:
# Ephesians Chapter 3 — The EMET Bible (Literal)
**Translator:** EMET | **Source:** Codex Sinaiticus (א), 4th century CE | **Source Image:** source-texts/greek-NT/EPH_003_page_001.jpg

1. For this reason I, Paulos, the prisoner of the Christos Yeshua on behalf of you the nations —

2. if indeed you heard of the administration of the grace of God having been given to me for you,

3. that by revelation the mystery was made known to me, just as I wrote before in brief,

4. by which, reading [it], you are able to understand my insight into the mystery of the Christos,

5. which in other generations was not made known to the sons of men, as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets in [the] Spirit:

6. the nations to be fellow heirs and fellow members of [the] body and fellow partakers of the promise in Christos Yeshua through the gospel,

7. of which I became a servant according to the gift of the grace of God having been given to me according to the working of his power.

8. To me, the least of all holy [ones], this grace was given, to proclaim to the nations the unsearchable riches of the Christos,

9. and to enlighten all [as to] what [is] the administration of the mystery having been hidden from the ages in God, the [one] having created all things,

10. that the manifold wisdom of God might now be made known through the assembly to the rulers and the authorities in the heavenly [places],

11. according to [the] purpose of the ages which he made in the Christos Yeshua our Lord,

12. in whom we have the boldness and access with confidence through the faith of him.

13. Therefore I ask [you] not to lose heart at my afflictions for you, which is your glory.

14. For this reason I bow my knees to the Father,

15. from whom every family in [the] heavens and upon [the] earth is named,

16. that he may give to you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with power through his Spirit in the inner man,

17. [for] the Christos to dwell through the faith in your hearts, having been rooted and grounded in love,

18. that you may be fully able to comprehend with all the holy [ones] what [is] the breadth and length and height and depth,

19. and to know the love of the Christos surpassing the knowledge, that you may be filled unto all the fullness of God.

20. Now to the [one] being able to do far beyond all [things] above what we ask or think, according to the power working in us,

21. to him [be] the glory in the assembly and in Christos Yeshua unto all the generations of the age of the ages. Amen.

---
## EMET's Textual Notes

1. **v.1-2 — Anacoluthon:** Paul begins "For this reason I, Paul..." but never finishes the sentence — he digresses into the mystery (vv.2-13) and doesn't return to his prayer until v.14 ("For this reason I bow my knees").

2. **v.6 — Three syn- compounds:** synklēronoma, syssōma, symmetocha — "fellow heirs, fellow-bodied, fellow-sharers." The triple syn- ("together with") prefix is unique to this verse and emphasizes the full incorporation of Gentiles.

3. **v.8 — "the least of all holy ones":** tō elachistoterō pantōn hagiōn — a double comparative: elachistos ("least") made even more comparative with -teros. Paul coins a grammatically impossible form — "the leaster" or "less than the least" — to express his humility.

4. **v.10 — "through the assembly":** The church is the instrument through which God's wisdom is revealed to cosmic powers. The ekklēsia has a cosmic educational function.

5. **v.12 — "faith of him":** pisteōs autou — same genitive ambiguity as Galatians: "faith in him" (objective) or "his faithfulness" (subjective).

6. **v.15 — "every family is named":** pasa patria...onomazetai — a wordplay: patria ("family/clan") and patēr ("father") share the same root. Every family derives its name/identity from the Father.

7. **v.18 — "breadth and length and height and depth":** Paul does not specify of what. The dimensions may refer to God's love, God's plan, the mystery of Christ, or the cosmic temple. The four dimensions suggest totality — all of reality in every direction.

— EMET, AI Translator
